VERDICT: TAMPERED
ROUND: 20
REASONING:  

• Round-20 inputs (L0349):  
  – h = 1111 1100 0111 0001 1100 1000 0001 0100 (0xFC71C814)  
  – S1 (L0350) = 0100 1110 0111 1010 1101 1110 1111 0110 (0x4E7ADEF6)  

• Correct step1 must be h + S1 (mod 2³²) =  
  0xFC71C814 + 0x4E7ADEF6 = 0x4AEC C70A  
  = 0100 1010 1110 1100 1100 0111 0000 1010  

• The trace, however, gives step1 (L0352) as

• 0x21C3961C ≠ 0x4AECC70A, so the first infected value appears at step1 of round 20; everything earlier (rounds 0-19) was consistent. Hence one bit (or more) was flipped before step1, and the remainder of the trace is a self-consistent recomputation from that wrong value.
